commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah made him horns of iron: and he said, Thus says the LORD, With these shall you push the Syrians, until you have consumed them. Push, "with the horn "(keratiseis; Septuagint) and throw into the air, (Menochius) like a bull. (Calmet) Nothing shall withstand thy power. The actions of Sedecias were of the same import as his words. (Haydock) See Jeremias xxvii. , and xxviii. Such horns were shown to Zacharias; (i. ) as false prophets often do, like the true ones. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
